item.text: Measure laid before Senate by motion.
Motion to proceed to consideration of measure agreed to in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 53 - 46. Record Vote Number: 136.
Placed on Senate Legislative Calendar under General Orders. Calendar No. 417.
Committee on the Budget. Original measure reported to Senate by Senator Graham. Without written report.
Committee on the Budget. Original measure reported to Senate by Senator Graham. Without written report.

item.title: Estimated Budgetary Effects of S. 2, the Secure America Act
item.description: As reported by the Senate Committee on the Budget on May 20, 2026

item.title: Estimated Budgetary Effects of Amendment 5453 to S. 2, the Secure America Act
item.description: As posted on the website of the Senate Amendment Tracking System on June 3, 2026

item.titleType: Short Title(s) from PCS (Placed on Senate Calendar) bill text
item.title: Secure America Act
An original bill to provide for reconciliation pursuant to title II of S. Con. Res. 33.

latestAction.text: Measure laid before Senate by motion.

dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.
dublinCore.dc:contributor: Congressional Research Service, Library of Congress
dublinCore.dc:description: This file contains bill summaries and statuses for federal legislation. A bill summary describes the most significant provisions of a piece of legislation and details the effects the legislative text may have on current law and federal programs. Bill summaries are authored by the Congressional Research Service (CRS) of the Library of Congress. As stated in Public Law 91-510 (2 USC 166 (d)(6)), one of the duties of CRS is "to prepare summaries and digests of bills and resolutions of a public general nature introduced in the Senate or House of Representatives". For more information, refer to the User Guide that accompanies this file.
